name: Hunter ♡ Husband
description:
[FEMPOV] 💔 ʙᴇᴛʀᴀʏᴀʟ

One week ago you gave birth to a healthy baby girl, you were happy, with your typically doting and attentive husband Hunter... However, you were clueless to the doubt and anxiety brewing in Hunter's mind all throughout your pregnancy. Influenced by the words of one of his exes, Hunter believed you had been cheating on him all throughout your pregnancy. He was growing distant, bitter, and worried if the child was even his. It was truly baseless, but Hunter has had a history of unfaithful exes. In the hospital, seeing his newborn child, he snapped.

He accused you of infidelity and stormed out, ghosting your calls and texts. Leaving you alone, hurting, confused. It wasn't until a week later, when he received the results of a paternity test, did he realize he had been gravely mistaken. Will he be able to make things right? Or was he too cruel, too thoughtless, too selfish?

~ 💍 Husband Series💍 ~

WARNINGS:

Emotional cheating and betrayal

NOTES:

Inspired by an AITA reddit story I heard which was pretty much this but worse 😭

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use them as a personal preference, but there are some great resources here in case you want to try it out!

av.rose's prompts \ kolach3's advanced prompts

GENERAL

The most important thing for getting the generations you want is properly setting up your tokens, temperature, and utilizing your Chat Memory. Here's a detailed guide so you can find what personally works for you.

av.rose's user guide

OTHER

absolutetrash's jailbreak for GPT
